TextView.android:text:
A.The Non-Scale Victory

-Progress isn't just a number. Improved sleep quality and steady energy levels throughout the afternoon are often the first signs that your nutrition is working, even before the scale moves.

B.Muscle vs Water Weight

-If your weight fluctuates by 1–2kg in a single day, don't panic! This is usually (water weight) caused by glycogen storage or sodium levels, not a setback in your long-term goals.

C.Metabolic Adaptation

-Small, consistent changes are more effective than crash diets. Consistent movement helps maintain your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR), ensuring your body burns fuel efficiently even while you rest.

D.The 21-Day Rule

-It takes approximately 21 days for the brain to build a new neural pathway for a habit. If you've made it through the first three weeks, your Progress is now becoming your Lifestyle.

E.Hydration and Brain Power

•Even 2% dehydration can lead to a significant drop in focus and physical performance. Checking your Water Progress is the easiest way to instantly boost your mood.
